data.body: Per user request: (1) attempted to close a118 — completion verifier FAILED on 5 OPERATIONAL ACs (>=10 clean shadow passes ~3+hrs, live heal, flag flip, live pass flag-ON, partial-failure rollback rehearsal), all multi-hour live; did NOT force-close. Fixed the 1 legitimate CODE gap it flagged (missing decision_census proof test) -> Gerrit change 435 (Verified+1, LLM+1). (2) STARTED d01e: claimed + plan-review PASSED (re-run) + pushed harness FOUNDATION (change 436, stacked on 435): reusable ArtifactTracker + _bilateral_teardown (backoff retry, leaked-artifacts.log, non-zero on leak), 'live' pytest marker, 3 OFFLINE ACs green (teardown-under-failure, teardown-exhaustion, blast-radius breaker), 8 live matrix scaffolds. Awaiting 436 CI -> submit stack. D1 REMAINING (live-run session): wire live AcliClient into the 8 scaffolds, run -m live matrix zero-leak, JSON report, ADR. eca4 still open (broad loader refactor, do LAST). Epic ace2 remains in_progress (a118 operational + d01e live + eca4 all multi-hour/live -> multi-session).
